items.question: What is considered a healthy diet?
items.answer: A healthy diet includes fruits, vegetables, whole grains, proteins, and healthy fats.

items.question: How much water should I drink daily?
items.answer: Adults should drink around 2 to 3 liters of water daily depending on activity level and climate.

items.question: How can I improve my overall health?
items.answer: Drink plenty of water, eat a balanced diet, and exercise regularly to maintain good health.

items.question: Why is regular exercise important?
items.answer: Exercise helps improve heart health, strengthen muscles, reduce stress, and maintain body weight.

items.question: What are the common symptoms of diabetes?
items.answer: Common symptoms of diabetes include increased thirst, frequent urination, fatigue, and blurred vision.
